description_long: This is a small, acoustic guitar with a blue soundboard featuring two yellow star decals near the lower bout. The body has a classic hourglass shape with a natural wood finish on the sides and back, and a contrasting dark blue top. The neck is dark, likely rosewood or ebony, with visible frets and a headstock that displays a white logo. The guitar has four strings, suggesting it is a ukulele or a similar small guitar variant. The tuning pegs are silver and positioned in two pairs on either side of the headstock. The bridge and soundhole are both simple and functional, with the bridge matching the dark color of the neck.
description: A small, blue-topped acoustic guitar with yellow star decals, natural wood sides, and four strings. The headstock features a white logo and silver tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue soundboard, yellow star decals, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the soundhole, star decals, and the symmetrical body shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the bridge, strings, and the natural wood back and sides.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the headstock logo, tuning pegs, and the alignment of the strings along the neck.
attribute_headstock_design: Rectangular headstock with two tuning pegs on each side, white logo on top, and a simple, flat contour.
